message.content:
@startuml
title 2. プロフィール編集

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBorderThickness 3
}

actor "お嬢" as OJ
participant "CABABA" as CAB
database "データベース" as DB
participant "LINE" as LINE

box "登録" #FFFFFF
  OJ -> CAB : ログイン画面
  activate CAB
  CAB --> OJ : LINEへリダイレクト
  deactivate CAB

  OJ -> LINE : LINEログイン画面
  activate LINE
  LINE --> CAB : リダイレクト (line_user_id)
  deactivate LINE

  activate CAB
  CAB -> DB : INSERT User
  activate DB
  DB --> CAB
  deactivate DB

  CAB --> OJ : プロフィール登録ページ

  OJ -> CAB : プロフィール送信

  CAB -> DB : INSERT HostessProfile
  activate DB
  DB --> CAB
  deactivate DB

  CAB --> OJ : 登録完了画面
  deactivate CAB
end box
@enduml
